title: Meituan LongCat 2.0 (Tested): China's 1.6T OPEN MODEL looks CRAZY!
summary: Meituan released LongCat-2.0, an open-weight Mixture-of-Experts model with 1.6 trillion total parameters that activates approximately 48 billion parameters per token. The model was trained for long-context, coding, research, and agentic tasks using AI ASIC superpods rather than Nvidia GPUs.
writeup: The video covers Meituan's LongCat-2.0, an open-weight Mixture-of-Experts model with 1.6 trillion total parameters that activates roughly 48 billion parameters per token. It matters because the model was trained on AI ASIC superpods rather than Nvidia GPUs, and it targets long-context, coding, research, and agentic tasks. AICodeKing tests the model against these workloads. Key architectural points include the sparse MoE design and sparse attention.
